text:
Defensive Wall (, rom. Difenshibu Wōru) is a spell card that can be found in the Greed Island game. It allows a player to protect themselves from a single spell card cast by another player.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This spell allows a player to protect themselves against a single spell card cast upon them by another player. This card needs to be used before the spell is actually cast. Otherwise, it will be effective against the next spell. This card has no effect on spells cast before its activation.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1003 :: 
他プレイヤーからの攻撃呪文を１度だけ防ぐ。
|-
![Eng]
|No.1003 :: Defensive Wall 
Prevent a one-time attack spell from another player.
|}
